ramesh.narrative: Good financial habits with some areas to improve. Suitable for microfinance loans with standard terms.

all_signals.name: Savings Discipline
all_signals.what_it_means: Whether money is saved after expenses each month
all_signals.why_it_matters: Self-control with savings = self-control with EMIs
all_signals.headline: Weak savings discipline — needs attention
improvements: Reduce monthly spending below income level — critical for score
Avoid overdraft completely — negative balance loses 20+ pts

all_signals.name: Income Stability
all_signals.what_it_means: How consistently and sufficiently money comes in
all_signals.why_it_matters: Regular income = ability to repay loan on time
all_signals.headline: Average income stability — room to grow
improvements: Consistent monthly income, even if smaller, improves score significantly
Stabilise income before reapplying

all_signals.name: Debt Burden
all_signals.what_it_means: Existing loans and their burden on monthly income
all_signals.why_it_matters: Too much existing debt = can't handle new loan
all_signals.headline: Average debt burden — room to grow
improvements: Avoid overdraft — negative balance is biggest trust killer

all_signals.name: Payment Consistency
all_signals.what_it_means: Whether bills and recharges are paid every month
all_signals.why_it_matters: Paying ₹199 Jio every month predicts loan repayment
all_signals.headline: Good payment consistency — above average
evidence: Recharge amount changes significantly each month
Utility bills paid in all 3 months ✓
improvements: Recharge every month without fail — adds ~25 pts instantly
Pick one fixed recharge plan — consistency signals stable income

all_signals.name: Transaction Activity
all_signals.what_it_means: How actively UPI is used across different merchants
all_signals.why_it_matters: Active digital footprint = more data = better assessment
all_signals.headline: Good transaction activity — above average
evidence: 24.0 UPI transactions per month — good activity
Spending across 9 categories — diverse financial life ✓
improvements: Reduce failed payments — 4 bounced payments loses 10 pts

all_signals.name: Spending Behavior
all_signals.what_it_means: Whether spending is consistent or erratic
all_signals.why_it_matters: Predictable spending = predictable person = safer loan
all_signals.headline: Strong spending behavior — top tier
